name: Defaults Manager
description: Owner-only platform Agent: curate the pre-install default Agents that NEW accounts are seeded with. Reaches platform state via the host-side ADMIN binding (wired only when the platform owner runs their own Agent). Deploy PRIVATE.

list_defaults.description: List the current platform default-install Agents (the set new accounts are seeded with), including whether each is still live and installable.

add_default.description: Add (or re-enable) an Agent as a platform default by its app id. The Agent must be public or unlisted. Affects FUTURE signups only — existing users are never modified.

app_id.description: The app id (uuid) of the Agent to add as a default

badge.description: Optional neutral provenance label shown on the seeded card (e.g. 'Starter'). Not a trust signal.

remove_default.description: Remove an Agent from the platform defaults by its app id. Stops FUTURE seeding; existing users who already have it keep it.

app_id.description: The app id (uuid) of the Agent to remove from defaults
